title: Child Workflow: Compliance - Evaluate and Grade
description: Evaluates each device's config against compliance rules via IAG5. Scores and aggregates results. Persists scan_results to IAP state store for trend tracking.

configs.description: Map of device_name → config_text. Output of Collect Configs child.

rules.description: Full rules array for the active standard. Loaded from GitLab by orchestrator.

scan_id.description: Unique scan identifier. Used as the key when storing results to IAP state store.

scan_results.description: Full per-device evaluation results. Also persisted to IAP state store.

fleet_summary.description: Aggregated posture across all evaluated devices

internal_steps: 1. Build device list from configs map keys
2. childJob loop (parallel) — call compliance_evaluate.py via IAG5 per device
3. Collect per-device results into device_results array
6. Store scan_results to IAP state store keyed by scan_id
